---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

<!--
SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0
-->

## Feature Summary

<!-- A brief one-sentence summary of the feature you'd like to see. -->

## Problem / Motivation

<!-- What problem does this solve? Who benefits from it? Why is this valuable for the target audience (children aged 7–9 and their parents/guardians)? -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the feature as clearly as possible. Include mockups, diagrams, or examples if helpful. -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you considered other approaches? Why is your proposed solution better? -->

## Child Safety & COPPA Considerations

<!--
This app is COPPA-compliant and targets children aged 7–9.
Please confirm that your feature request respects the following constraints:
-->

- [ ] Does not collect or transmit personally identifiable information (PII)
- [ ] Does not include analytics, tracking, or advertising
- [ ] Does not add external links that navigate children away from the app
- [ ] Does not include social media integrations
- [ ] Content remains age-appropriate for children aged 7–9

## Additional Context

<!-- Screenshots, related issues, links to research, etc. -->

## Checklist (for the requester)

- [ ] I have searched existing issues and this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I have considered the child safety implications above
- [ ] This feature aligns with the project's core purpose (AI-powered bedtime stories for children)
